history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, eye-level, slightly tilted selfie of a young East Asian woman with dark hair and bangs. She is wearing large, black-rimmed glasses and a cozy, cream-colored sweater with thick horizontal stripes of light blue and white. Her right hand, covered by the sweater's sleeve, is raised to her mouth, obscuring part of her face as she smiles shyly. The lighting is soft and warm, casting a gentle glow on her skin and highlighting the texture of the knit sweater. The background is softly blurred, suggesting an indoor setting with hints of ornate picture frames and patterned cushions, possibly a living room. The overall mood is intimate, warm, and playful, with a touch of youthful shyness. The color palette is dominated by warm neutrals, soft blues, and the dark tones of her hair and glasses. The style is candid and naturalistic, with a slightly vintage or dreamy filter.
